marketName: All Other Miscellaneous Fabricated Metal Product Manufacturing

alternatives.name: Hot-rolled standard bar stock + plate stock (flame-cut, CNC-milled to geometry)
alternatives.tradeoffs: 50-80% stock removal for non-rectangular shapes; separate IH or case hardening step required; unlimited availability; zero qualification burden; IS the cost benchmark; ~55% share [SRC: JTBD_general_mechanical_engineering]

alternatives.name: Cold-drawn / cold-rolled near-net-shape profiles (ZOLLERN position)
alternatives.tradeoffs: 6-12 week die lead time for new geometry; ~100 kg min batch; steel-only; limited to constant 2D cross-section; pre-hardened delivery eliminates OEM L6c hardening step entirely; IT8 tolerance; ~12% share [SRC: JTBD_general_mechanical_engineering]

alternatives.name: Pre-cut flame/laser-cut plate blanks
alternatives.tradeoffs: Zero tooling cost; lead time 1-3 weeks; high material waste (nesting losses); no hardness advantage; rough cut requires finish milling; flame-cut thermal distortion; ~23% share [SRC: ADJ_general_mechanical_engineering]

alternatives.name: Cast iron integral slideway (GJL-250 Meehanite)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Inherent vibration damping; no hardening required; long casting lead time (6-12 weeks); heavy; declining for precision applications; ~15% of slideway segment [SRC: ADJ_general_mechanical_engineering]

alternatives.name: Do nothing / continue with existing supplier (status quo)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Zero switching cost; zero qualification burden; most common competitor; only displaced by cost advantage, quality improvement, or supply failure at incumbent
